channel.title: coffee on Patrick Armengol
channel.description: Recent content in coffee on Patrick Armengol

item.title: Coffee in Orlando
item.description: Note: These are the opinions of an idiot that knows a tiny bit about coffee and has very particular preferences. Orlando, FL Orlando is my home town. It’s where I grew up. It’s where I went to university. It’s where my parents live. Orlando sucks. It’s a perpetually hot and humid, sprawly, stroad-ridden mess, filled with insane/old people. It’s a typical, car-centric, sun-belt city and the only thing it seems to have going for it is tourism.
